source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ FDA/■ 1차 ADD_510(k)_submission_Final_201023.zip/WORD/VOL_001_510(k) Submission/017_Performance Testing - Bench.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Bench performance testing statement for ADD identifying IEC 62220-1 as the applicable consensus standard.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports safety and effectiveness of the device through compliance with identified current standards and points to Appendix I, Non-Clinical Test Report.
keyPoints: The ADD has validated performance according to IEC 62220-1.
IEC 62220-1 is identified as a consensus standard.
The document states that compliance with identified current standards supports safety and effectiveness.
The document references Appendix I, Non-Clinical Test Report.

entities.name: ADD
entities.evidence: The ADD has validated the performance according to the following standard:

concepts.name: Detective Quantum Efficiency
concepts.evidence: Determination of the Detective Quantum Efficiency

concepts.name: Digital X-ray imaging devices
concepts.evidence: Characteristics of Digital X-ray Imaging Devices

concepts.name: Non-clinical test report
concepts.evidence: See Appendix I. Non-Clinical Test Report

evidence.claim: The document is titled Performance Testing - Bench.
ADD performance was validated according to IEC 62220-1.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD has validated the performance according to the following standard: IEC 62220-1 (First Edition)

evidence.claim: IEC 62220-1 is identified as a consensus standard.
The IEC 62220-1 standard title concerns characteristics of digital X-ray imaging devices and determination of Detective Quantum Efficiency for detectors used in radiographic imaging.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Electrical Equipment – Characteristics of Digital X-ray Imaging Devices – Part 1-1: Determination of the Detective Quantum Efficiency – Detectors Used in Radiographic Imaging

evidence.claim: Compliance with the identified current standards supports safety and effectiveness of the device.
evidence.evidenceText: Through compliance with the identified current standards, the safety and effectiveness of the device is supported.

evidence.claim: The document refers readers to Appendix I, Non-Clinical Test Report.
evidence.evidenceText: See Appendix I. Non-Clinical Test Report
